title: What should you name your aesthetics business？
filename: What should you name your aesthetics business？.en.vtt
excerpt: So what should you name your aesthetics business my criteria when i started out was firstly to be unique i think that's the most important thing now you don't have to be unique in the world but you definitely need to be unique in the area where you are offering treatments if ther…

segments.text: so what should you name your aesthetics business my criteria when i started out was firstly to be unique i think that's the most important thing now you don't have to be unique in the world but you definitely need to be unique in the area where you are offering treatments if there are two businesses with the exact same name that will cause you a headache for years and later on might even cause you to get a letter from that business saying cease or desist so uniqueness is number one the next thing is i would take some pressure off yourself trying to come up with some genius name think of all the businesses in the world that have famous brands nike apple asda these words basically mean nothing except for the meaning given to them by the years of trust building that those businesses have put in to their audience so the most important factor is what does that name come to mean to your patients over time a lot of practitioners use their own name and i think this is perfect it's very unique and people obviously associate you with it if you plan on expanding your clinic

and having multiple clinicians it may not be suitable but you still have to choose a word that you give the meaning to over time you don't have to put your services into the name so don't you don't have to call it injectable aesthetics or something like that a lot of people do that it just makes it very cardboard cut out no one really knows what it means choose a name that's unique and then you infuse it with meaning over time through what you do in your business practices that's really what good brands are built from

keyPoints.text: So what should you name your aesthetics business my criteria when i started out was firstly to be unique i think that's the most important thing now you don't have to be unique in the world but you definitely need to be …

transcript: so what should you name your aesthetics business my criteria when i started out was firstly to be unique i think that's the most important thing now you don't have to be unique in the world but you definitely need to be unique in the area where you are offering treatments if there are two businesses with the exact same name that will cause you a headache for years and later on might even cause you to get a letter from that business saying cease or desist so uniqueness is number one the next thing is i would take some pressure off yourself trying to come up with some genius name think of all the businesses in the world that have famous brands nike apple asda these words basically mean nothing except for the meaning given to them by the years of trust building that those businesses have put in to their audience so the most important factor is what does that name come to mean to your patients over time a lot of practitioners use their own name and i think this is perfect it's very unique and people obviously associate you with it if you plan on expanding your clinic and having multiple clinicians it may not be suitable but you still have to choose a word that you give the meaning to over time you don't have to put your services into the name so don't you don't have to call it injectable aesthetics or something like that a lot of people do that it just makes it very cardboard cut out no one really knows what it means choose a name that's unique and then you infuse it with meaning over time through what you do in your business practices that's really what good brands are built from
